html:
Exclusive to:

The Mant Suit is a craftable Armor Item exclusive to the Don't Starve: Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab. It requires 5 Chitin and 1 Log Suit to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

It has a Durability of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. While being worn, the Mant Suit's durability will slowly decrease even when not taking damage, lasting a maximum of 10 Days if no damage is taken. A Sewing Kit will repair the Mant Suit by 50% (225 HP).

When worn along with a Mant Mask, it also allows the player to disguise among the Mants and make them neutral. They will still defend themselves if attacked, but this way they can be approached safely. However, Warrior Mants will not be fooled by the disguise.

Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

The Mant Suit is a craftable Armor Item exclusive to the Don't Starve: Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab. It requires 5 Chitin and 1 Log Suit to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
It has a Durability of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. While being worn, the Mant Suit's durability will slowly decrease even when not taking damage, lasting a maximum of 10 Days if no damage is taken. A Sewing Kit will repair the Mant Suit by 50% (225 HP).
When worn along with a Mant Mask, it also allows the player to disguise among the Mants and make them neutral. They will still defend themselves if attacked, but this way they can be approached safely. However, Warrior Mants will not be fooled by the disguise.

The '''Mant Suit''' is a craftable [[Armor]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Fight Tab]]. It requires 5 [[Chitin]] and 1 [[Log Suit]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.

It has a [[Durability]] of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. While being worn, the Mant Suit's durability will slowly decrease even when not taking damage, lasting a maximum of 10 Days if no damage is taken. A [[Sewing Kit]] will repair the Mant Suit by 50% (225 HP).

When worn along with a [[Mant Mask]], it also allows the player to disguise among the [[Mant]]s and make them neutral. They will still defend themselves if attacked, but this way they can be approached safely. However, [[Warrior Mant]]s will not be fooled by the disguise.
